name: blazity
description: Blazity Atlas plugins for governed AI engineering workflows.

plugins.name: nextjs-migration-plugin
plugins.description: Guided component-first migrations from public websites to production-ready Next.js App Router projects.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Set up and maintain your repo's AI context — AGENTS.md, memory, vocabulary, ADRs — and run reviews that leave recorded verdicts. One shared workspace for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
